turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi, this is Sam with SunPeak Solar, following up on your interest in solar. Do you have a minute?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Sure, I filled out a form the other day.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Great. Just to confirm, are you the homeowner at the property?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect. What's got you thinking about solar, and any timeline in mind?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: My bills keep climbing. I'd want it done in the next couple of months.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Makes sense. Roughly what's your average monthly electric bill?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: That's a great fit for solar. Let's book a free consultation. Thursday at 3pm work?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You're booked for Thursday at 3pm. I'll email the confirmation. Thanks, Dan!
